prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: full-screen LOD 1-2 game-map art plate for ASMR Shinkansen runtime overlay
Primary request: Create a polished early-2000s Japanese railway management simulator overview of the whole Japanese archipelago, geographically faithful and recognizable: Hokkaido, Honshu, Shikoku, Kyushu, Tokyo Bay, Ise Bay, Osaka Bay, Seto Inland Sea, mountain ranges, forests and major city clusters.
Style/medium: dense isometric pixel-art / A-Train / SimCity BuildIt reference, miniature transport sim map, crisp hand-painted pixels, readable geography, not photoreal.
Composition/framing: 16:9 wide map, Japan from southwest to northeast, no UI panels, no labels, no readable text.
Lighting/mood: calm clear morning, relaxing ASMR atlas, rich ocean blue and lush terrain.
Constraints: prioritize actual Japan silhouette and city cluster placement; no fantasy continents, no giant trains, no logos, no watermark, no text.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: LOD 3-4 regional game-map art plate for Tokaido Shinkansen overview
Primary request: Create a polished isometric pixel-art regional map of central Japan from Tokyo/Yokohama through Shizuoka, Nagoya, Kyoto and Osaka, with coastline, bays, mountains, rivers, urban clusters and a subtle Tokaido rail corridor.
Style/medium: late-1990s/early-2000s Japanese transport sim, dense but readable miniature map, A-Train / SimCity reference, not photoreal.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9, rail corridor left-right across the middle third, no UI, no labels, no readable text.
Lighting/mood: calm sunny, cozy railway ambience.
Constraints: geography must feel like real central Honshu; no pasted sprites, no giant trains, no logos, no watermark.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: LOD 5-6 corridor art plate for Tokyo to Shin-Yokohama
Primary request: Create a dense isometric pixel-art railway corridor view from Tokyo Station toward Shin-Yokohama, including real-feeling urban density, canals, highways, station yards, parallel rail lines and Shinkansen viaduct hints.
Style/medium: early-2000s Japanese transport management sim, crisp detailed pixel-art, cohesive city-map texture, not photoreal.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9, rail corridor diagonal lower-left to upper-right, no UI, no labels, no readable text.
Lighting/mood: soft morning, ASMR calm, high detail without clutter.
Constraints: must feel like Tokyo/Kanagawa urban rail fabric, not countryside; no giant trains, no logos, no watermark.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: LOD 7-8 city art plate for Tokyo Station area
Primary request: Create a detailed isometric pixel-art Tokyo Station Shinkansen rail yard scene: many parallel tracks, arched platform roofs, overhead catenary, dense Marunouchi/Yaesu office blocks, roads, canals, buses, tiny passengers and trees.
Style/medium: polished late-1990s/early-2000s Japanese railway management game, dense hand-painted pixel detail, similar level of detail to reference UI screenshots, not photoreal.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 game map tile, no UI panels, no labels, no readable text.
Lighting/mood: calm clear day, quiet operational ambience.
Constraints: must feel like central Tokyo station district; no rural fields, no logos, no watermark.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: LOD 9-10 city art plate for Shin-Yokohama
Primary request: Create a detailed isometric pixel-art Shin-Yokohama Shinkansen district: station platforms, elevated viaduct, urban blocks, local roads, river/canal hints, parks, mid-rise buildings, overhead wires, small cars and station plazas.
Style/medium: early-2000s Japanese transport sim, A-Train / SimCity-like dense pixel-art, cohesive miniature city.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 game map tile, no UI panels, no labels, no readable text.
Lighting/mood: calm daylight, ASMR rail ambience.
Constraints: must feel like Yokohama urban/suburban rail district, not generic coast fantasy; no logos, no watermark.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: LOD 11-12 city art plate for Nagoya Station
Primary request: Create a detailed isometric pixel-art Nagoya Station Shinkansen district: large terminal, broad roads, rail approaches, commercial towers, civic blocks, subtle castle-inspired landmark cue, overhead catenary, small vehicles and trees.
Style/medium: polished late-1990s/early-2000s Japanese transport management sim, dense but readable pixel-art.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 game map tile, no UI panels, no labels, no readable text.
Lighting/mood: calm sunny, orderly railway city ambience.
Constraints: must feel like Nagoya, not Tokyo, not rural; no logos, no watermark.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: LOD 13-14 city art plate for Kyoto Station
Primary request: Create a detailed isometric pixel-art Kyoto Station Shinkansen district: station platforms, gridded city blocks, temple roof accents, river hints, surrounding hills/mountains in the distance, compact urban fabric, catenary, small vehicles and trees.
Style/medium: early-2000s Japanese railway management sim, dense hand-painted pixels, A-Train / SimCity reference.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 game map tile, no UI panels, no labels, no readable text.
Lighting/mood: calm sunny, warm Kyoto tones, relaxing ASMR ambience.
Constraints: must feel like Kyoto city, not rural-only; no logos, no watermark.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: LOD 15-16 city art plate for Shin-Osaka
Primary request: Create a detailed isometric pixel-art Shin-Osaka Shinkansen district: major station interchange, multiple rail corridors, dense Osaka urban blocks, river/canal hints, roads, bridges, overhead wires, platform roofs, small vehicles and trees.
Style/medium: polished late-1990s/early-2000s Japanese transport management sim, dense cohesive pixel-art, not photoreal.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 game map tile, no UI panels, no labels, no readable text.
Lighting/mood: calm daylight, busy but quiet ASMR station ambience.
Constraints: must feel like Osaka urban rail district, no logos, no watermark.
